prompt: Generate a homepage of a modern news website using the layout structure from the first image and the headline typography and color theme from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a modern news website homepage. Replicate the multi-column layout structure from image 1, including its prominent masthead, the large main article section on the left with a featured image, and the secondary article column on the right. For typography, apply the large, bold, sans-serif headline style from image 2 to all main headlines, and use the unique, stylized font from image 2's 'GOODGOODGOOD' masthead for the new website's masthead. Adopt the vibrant, warm color palette (featuring oranges, reds, and light browns with gradient accents) from image 2 for the overall design, including navigational elements and section dividers, while maintaining the clean, structured content grid organization of image 1.
objects: Prominent masthead with unique, stylized font
Large main article section on the left
Featured image within the large main article section
Secondary article column on the right
Main headlines with large, bold, sans-serif typography
Vibrant, warm color palette (oranges, reds, light browns, gradient accents)
